plan.description: Snapshot-only example: bond clean prices supplied via initial_market.prices keyed by bond ID, with no calibration steps. Demonstrates Track B for fixed-income — non-bootstrapped bond marks loaded as MarketScalar values. The MarketScalar shape is shared with equity spot prices (see 08_equity_vol_surface.json). Three bonds are included: a 10-year US Treasury, an IBM 7-year corporate bond, and a Microsoft 5-year corporate bond. Clean prices are near par (99–105) as is typical for investment-grade fixed-income instruments close to issuance.
